Bugs sharing a root cause are grouped here. Click any ticket ID to jump to its full bug card.
QA-10 -001 LOW P3
Failed: Test qa10 arabic url loads
https://dev.mehadedu.com/en test_qa10_arabic_url_loads 2026-06-12 10:54:50 15.01s
What this test was checking
/ar URL must load without redirecting to /en — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Switch the page language to Arabic (or load /ar)
  3. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)

Failed: Test qa10 arabic h1 non empty
https://dev.mehadedu.com/en test_qa10_arabic_h1_non_empty 2026-06-12 10:54:50 15.00s
What this test was checking
H1 on /ar must be non-empty (localized headline) — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Switch the page language to Arabic (or load /ar)
  3. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
What should happen
H1 on /ar must be non-empty (localized headline).
What actually happened
The test could not load the page within 15000ms — the server is too slow or unreachable.
